prompt: Extreme close-up macro shot. Tan-skinned female hands delicately holding a sleek, brushed metal hardware security key, moments before inserting it into a laptop side port. The focus is razor-sharp on the fingertips and the texture of the key, symbolizing the 'physical' reality of digital safety and access control. The subject wears a deep indigo wool blazer sleeve (Primary #2563eb). The background is creamy bokeh with hints of deep forest green foliage (Secondary #1e40af) and a small pop of burnt orange from a notebook spine (Accent #3b82f6). The atmosphere is quiet, precise, and secure, focusing entirely on the craft of data protection. Vibrant Kodak Ektar 100 colors with punchy saturation, shot on Hasselblad X2D 100C, 85mm lens, f/2.8, natural skin texture, golden hour warmth, editorial photography for Vogue Business
